overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Hufflepuff student navigating through the castle's gothic architecture. The character ascends outdoor stone staircases, traverses interior corridors with vaulted ceilings and portraits, crosses a grand hall with red carpets, and descends into darker mist-filled areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stone staircase with ivy-covered walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone stairs alongside a wall covered in green ivy, approaching a large green door at the top

entered.detail: wide stone stairs curving upward with weathered steps
stone wall covered in dense green climbing ivy
ornate black iron fence running along the upper edge of the stairs
tall weathered green door with intricate metal scrollwork decoration

segments.scene_description: The character ascends an outdoor stone staircase flanked by an ivy-covered wall on the right and an ornate iron railing visible above on the left. The overcast sky provides diffused natural lighting as the character approaches a large decorative green door at the top of the stairs.

events.description: character opens and walks through the large green door from outdoor stairs into indoor corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the large green door into a stone corridor lined with framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: multiple framed paintings hanging on the stone walls depicting various figures
gothic stone archway at the end of the entry hall
ornate vaulted ceiling with ribbed stone arches and decorative elements
thick stone support columns along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters the castle through the large green door into a stone corridor. The space features a high vaulted ceiling, stone columns, and walls adorned with framed portraits. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural light from windows and interior ambient light.

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with high vaulted ceilings and stone columns on both sides

entered.detail: dark wooden door with metal studs at the end of the corridor
large potted plant in a decorative stone planter

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a narrow enclosed corridor with an ornate vaulted ceiling now directly overhead. Stone columns line both sides of the passage as the character approaches a wooden door at the far end, passing a potted plant along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with tall gothic windows

agents.ego_description: walking down a long corridor with tall windows on the right, passing suits of armor and approaching a golden statue

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a wooden bench reading near the windows

entered.detail: tall gothic arched windows with intricate tracery allowing natural light to enter
medieval suits of armor standing on display along the left wall
golden statue on a pedestal at the far end of the corridor
wooden bench positioned against the window wall
large double wooden doors with metal hardware beyond the statue

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long corridor illuminated by tall gothic windows on the right side. Suits of armor line the left wall while a golden statue stands at the far end. A student sits on a wooden bench reading near the windows as the character approaches large wooden doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with main staircase

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and enters a grand hall with red carpet and imposing staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through large doors into a grand hall and ascending the main staircase with ornate railings

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a bench against the wall conversing

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate carved railings ascending to upper levels
long red carpet runner covering the center of the hall floor and stairs
large ornate chandelier hanging from the high ceiling
upper level stone balconies with carved railings overlooking the hall

segments.scene_description: The character opens large wooden doors to reveal a grand hall with a wide staircase ascending ahead. A red carpet runs down the center of the marble floor and up the stairs, while a large chandelier hangs overhead. Two students sit on a bench to the right as the character begins ascending the main staircase.

agents.ego_description: walking through upper level corridors passing other students and navigating around corners

notable_agents.action: student in blue robe walking in the opposite direction
student ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: narrow stone corridor with walls lined with framed portraits
framed portraits hanging on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through upper level corridors where the crowd density increases. The narrow stone passages are lined with portrait frames, and the character passes other students walking in opposite directions while following a student ahead toward a stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark descending stairwell with blue atmospheric mist

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically to dark blue tones as character descends into misty lower levels

agents.ego_description: descending a dark stone stairwell into a corridor filled with blue atmospheric mist and wall sconces

notable_agents.action: figure in dark clothing walking ahead into the blue mist

entered.detail: narrow stone stairwell descending into darkness with worn steps
thick blue atmospheric mist filling the lower corridor
lit wall sconces providing dim illumination along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a darker area of the castle, where the lighting shifts to a moody blue tone. A thick blue mist fills the lower stairwell and corridor, partially obscuring the view ahead. Wall sconces provide dim lighting as the character follows another figure into the misty depths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright, overcast exterior of the castle into its increasingly opulent interior, eventually descending into a moody, mist-shrouded depth. It begins with the character ascending an outdoor stone staircase beside an ivy-covered wall before passing through a large green door into a vaulted stone corridor adorned with portraits. The scene then shifts through a series of narrower passages and gothic halls, moving past suits of armor and reading students toward a grand hall featuring a red-carpeted marble floor and a massive overhead chandelier. As the character ascends to the upper levels, the environment becomes more crowded with students navigating portrait-lined corridors before turning toward a descending stairwell. Finally, the lighting transforms from warm gold to a dim blue tone as the camera follows a figure down into a corridor filled with thick, obscuring mist.
